title: Smoking Plus
description: Makes some items and blocks smeltable in the Smoker for faster smelting.
body:
### All the smokables
```
Cactus -> Green Dye
Sea Pickle -> Lime Dye
Chorus Fruit -> Popped Chorus Fruit
Wet Sponge -> Sponge
Resin Clump -> Resin Brick
Leaves -> Leaf Litter
```

All of these items are smeltable in the normal Furnace in vanilla. This Data Pack just makes them smeltable in the Smoker!


If you'd like a Blast Furnace counterpart, try [Blasting Plus](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blasting-plus)!
